articles.author: Kimberly Leonard, Nahal Toosi
articles.title: Trump’s Cuban American base is no longer guaranteeing him loyalty - Politico
articles.description: Florida’s Cuban American community is on a pressure campaign to make sure the Trump administration knows it’s regime change, or else.
articles.content: Similar outcomes in Cuba are unlikely to satisfy the Cuban diaspora. An April poll for the Miami Herald of Cuban exiles found that 78 percent said theyd be dissatisfied with economic reforms alone. A… [+2997 chars]
